strengths: Broad full-stack and distributed-systems experience across 15+ years
Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at current role
Strong software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based)
concerns: No demonstrated executive leadership or scaling teams from 10 to 30+
Lacks production multi-agent AI systems track record at required depth
response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned senior individual contributor with strong engineering craftsmanship, broad polyglot experience, and some recent exposure to agentic AI tooling, but the resume does not show the executive leadership, team-scaling, production multi-agent AI, or regulated fintech-infrastructure background that the CTO role explicitly requires.
